## Pre-merge checklist

- [ ] **CLAUDE.md** updated *(if architecture, tools, commands or commit scopes changed)*
- [ ] **.vibe/CONTEXT.md** updated *(if file count, layout or LLM tool count changed)*
- [ ] **README.md** updated *(if user-facing CLI flags or commands changed)*
- [ ] **Badges in README** still accurate *(version, build status, license)*
- [ ] **No secrets** committed *(no .env, no API keys, no personal paths)*
- [ ] **Conventional commit format** *(`type(scope): summary`)*
